title: OpenRoboArena
tagline: Turns public robotics projects into a discoverable catalog with a safe, prompt-driven 3D motion demo
description: OpenRoboArena is a live browser experience for discovering public robotics repositories and interacting with a local 3D Motion Control Lab. The lab sends unsupported natural-language movement phrasing to EconomyOS Compute, which returns a constrained local animation label. The browser only plays local FBX animation assets and never executes submitted repository code or initiates a blockchain transaction.

visual.title: give a robot a movement command

skills.name: openroboarena-motion-control
skills.summary: Run the public OpenRoboArena Motion Control Lab with supported plain-language commands and verify its local animation safety boundaries.

soul.summary: Public OpenRoboArena agent context covering its robotics discovery and motion-control role, permitted inputs, and safety boundaries.

feedbackPrompts: Which open-source robotics project should OpenRoboArena profile next?
What movement commands would make the Motion Control Lab most useful for a first-time visitor?
What public proof would make the EconomyOS workflow easiest to evaluate?
